heading: Repealed. ,July 16, 1947, ch. 256, § 161 Stat. 327
label: 1 to 6 Repealed. ,July 16, 1947, ch. 256, § 161 Stat. 327
notes: Section 1, R.S. § 5263, related to use of public domain.
Section 2, R.S. § 5264, related to use of materials from public lands.
Section 3, R.S. § 5266; acts , ; , , related to Government priority in transmission of messages.June 19, 1934, ch. 652, § 60148 Stat. 1101Mar. 6, 1943, ch. 10, § 657 Stat. 12
Section 4, R.S. § 5267; , , related to purchase of lines.act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, § 60148 Stat. 1101
Section 5, R.S. § 5268; , , related to acceptance of obligations to be filed.act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, § 60148 Stat. 1101
Section 6, R.S. § 5265; , , provided that rights were not transferable.act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, § 60148 Stat. 1101

Effective Date of Repeal, , provided that:Act July 16, 1947, ch. 256, § 361 Stat. 327“This Act [repealing sections 1 to 6 and 8 of this title] shall take effect on the tenth day following the enactment date thereof [].”July 16, 1947

Authority of Federal Communications Commission; Effect of Repeal, , provided that:Act July 16, 1947, ch. 256, § 261 Stat. 327“Nothing in this Act [repealing sections 1 to 6 and 8 of this title] shall limit the authority of the Federal Communications Commission under the provisions of the Communications Act of 1934, as amended [chapter 5 of this title], to prescribe charges, classifications, regulations, and practices, including priorities, applicable to Government communications.”
